characterPresencePlanEn: the protagonist should be clearly readable in the frame through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event stays primary
framingZh: 让构图跟随同一个生活瞬间，保持动作和空间的连贯性。
framingEn: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action of pausing while tidying
mustShowZh: 手指在笔记本或纸张边缘暂停的动作
部分打开的随身物品（如笔记本、计划本）
mustShowEn: finger paused at the edge of a notebook or planner
sleeve cuff or part of the arm
partially opened carried item (e.g., notebook, planner)
mayShowZh: 午后阳光在书脊或桌面投下的光带
桌上的文具（如机械铅笔、收据一角、压平的叶子）
mayShowEn: afternoon sunlight casting a light band on a bookshelf or table
stationery on the table (e.g., mechanical pencil, receipt corner, pressed leaf)
mustAvoidZh: 没有人物痕迹的空旷风景
将动作重写成与他人互动
mustAvoidEn: rewriting the action into an interaction with another person
atmosphereZh: 一个真实的生活切片，在流逝中被捕捉。
altTextZh: 角色在整理时因计划本而短暂停顿的日常瞬间。
